niche.positioning: Practical tools and checklists for matching apartment window light to houseplant placement.
why: Long-tail search demand around window direction, low light, and apartment plant placement.
Low legal, financial, medical, and safety risk.
Original utility can be built with calculators, decision trees, diagrams, and measured datasets.
Traffic can plausibly arrive from specific queries within 30 days.

lastAction.summary: Created repository sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and rss.xml pointing to https://windowplantlab.com; updated state to 'indexing'. Owner action required: set SITE_URL in deployment, add Cloudflare Web Analytics token, and verify Search Console property.
lastAction.validationMetric: Sitemap and robots.txt present in repository at /public; site URL set in experiment-state. Verification of Search Console and Cloudflare Web Analytics remains pending and must be completed by the owner.

ownerGated: Verify Google Search Console property and submit sitemap.
